workflows.scope: Roadmap-driven product work and milestone continuation.
validation_commands: wsl.exe bash -lc 'cd /home/fa507/dev/accessible_reader/backend && .venv/bin/python -c "from app.main import app; print(app.title)"'

workflows.scope: Edge read-aloud, sentence highlighting, progress restore, and manual browser validation.

contracts.template_read_policy: Read docs/assistant/templates/* only when the user explicitly asks for harness/bootstrap prompt creation, cross-project Codex scaffolding, or a follow-up delta/refinement prompt.
contracts.delta_refinement_prompt_policy: When the user explicitly asks for a follow-up delta/refinement prompt based on later prototype or live-review learnings, use docs/assistant/templates/CODEX_DELTA_REFINEMENT_PROMPT.md and keep the pass inspect-first: keep good work, correct weak work, add only the meaningful delta.
contracts.wsl_toolchain_home: Run git, npm, pytest, and uvicorn from WSL against /home/fa507/dev/accessible_reader.
contracts.browser_target: Validate browser behavior in Windows Edge on Windows 11.
contracts.local_first_default: Keep parsing, storage, search, settings, progress, and deterministic reflow local-first.
contracts.web_import_scope: Public webpage import is limited to article-style pages, fetched once, stored locally as snapshots, and never live-synced on reopen.
contracts.speech_path: Browser-native speechSynthesis is the shipped read-aloud path for v1.
contracts.local_tts_status: Local TTS remains deferred and should be described as coming soon unless the user reprioritizes it.
contracts.ai_scope: AI is opt-in only and limited to Simplify and Summary.
contracts.ux_priority: Prefer the best Recall-quality workflow over preserving the current UI structure; preserve local-first behavior, routes, anchors, and reading continuity instead of freezing layout.
contracts.validation_strategy: Run targeted validation before broad checks; keep backend pytest targeted when backend code is untouched.
contracts.push_policy: Do not push unless the user explicitly asks.
contracts.execplan_policy: Major or multi-file work must start by creating or updating an ExecPlan in docs/exec_plans/active/.
